release_notes: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Hardcoded version removed - now uses dynamic version
✅ Improved installer wait logic - prevents 'file not found' error
🔒 Added /DIR parameter to force correct install directory
⚡ Extended wait time for installer to complete (15 seconds)
🎨 All previous fixes from v1.1.6 and v1.1.7 included
